Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to the completion of the reviewer assignment phase (last SW-AE Assign Reviewers before a response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 Cycle Time within the reviewer selection sub-process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the end of the case

Name: Average time since the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper are performed in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper'

Name: Total time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the next reminder (e.g., another Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Minimum time for Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 in variants leading to SW-EIC Reject versus variants leading to major revisions
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 and the end of the case

Name: Time to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 since the SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Total waiting time to the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 after the first reviewer invitation in a case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time it takes the Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 to be done after the review selection deadline is missed (SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 grouped by the number of prior SW-Reviewer Declined activities in the case
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Reviewer Declined'", 'end': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
